ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – Client Feedback Updated
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that the issue in ticket #12345 has been fully resolved. 

**Summary of Fix**
- The build pipeline was failing due to a missing environment variable. 
- Added the `ENV_PROD` variable to the CI configuration and redeployed.
- Ran the integration tests locally; all tests pass.

**Next Steps**
- The client has confirmed that the application is now stable.
- Please close the ticket and update the status to "Done" in Jira.
- Forward the updated changelog to the release manager.

Thanks for the quick turnaround!

Best,
Rajesh

---

Note: If you have any questions, ping me on Slack or reply to this email.

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Account Locked – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected unusual activity on your corporate account. For your security, the account has been temporarily locked. 

To unlock your account, please verify your identity by clicking the link below:
<URL>

After verification, you will receive a confirmation email and your access will be restored. 

Please note: If you do not verify within 24 hours, your account will be permanently disabled. 

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
IT Helpdesk Team
